note: Informational pre-check for Repository Transaction Framework Stage 4 (Validation) / Stage 5 (Publication). Does not block either stage.

categories_present.label: Generated artifact
categories_present.owning_authority: SYNC_PROTOCOL.md Generated Artifact Rule; docs/shared/reference/DATABASE_TRUTH.md for DB dumps/manifests specifically.
categories_present.required_doc_updates: None — never hand-edit a generated artifact.
categories_present.practical_verification: Identify the generator script, re-run it, and confirm the regenerated output's manifest/hash matches (repo_health_audit.mjs Check 6 does this for supabase/backups/full_metadata.sql specifically).
categories_present.review_reason: Safe if produced by its own generator in this same change. Recommend review only if it appears hand-edited (drift) rather than regenerated.
